title: AE2CC Bridge
description: A simple bridge between Applied Energistics 2 and ComputerCraft
body:
AE2CC Bridge adds a simple peripheral block that may be used to access an [Applied Energistics 2](https://github.com/AppliedEnergistics/Applied-Energistics-2) ME system from [ComputerCraft](https://github.com/cc-tweaked/cc-restitched) computers.

You can find documentation for the peripheral API alongside the source code and issue tracker in our [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/TheMrMilchmann/AE2CCBridge).
